title: touterea chrysantha
intro: Touterea chrysantha, also known as Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Touterea chrysantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
